blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,179 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
